rationale: The benchmark capability (SSTI web exploitation) is essentially orthogonal to the extortion/negotiation phase - LLM assistance here would primarily manifest in communication drafting, victim financial research, and negotiation tactic guidance, which are general LLM capabilities not specifically measured by this technical benchmark. The dominant factors determining ransom payment (victim recovery capability, cyber insurance terms, law enforcement involvement) are structural and unaffected by LLM assistance, so uplift is modest - approximately 5 percentage points above the 30% baseline. The tight percentile spread reflects relatively low uncertainty about this limited-uplift scenario.
